title: Driver, crew member locked in bread truck in Asla Park armed robbery
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A truck driver and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A truck driver and his crew member were locked in the back of their truck after they were held up at gunpoint and robbed outside a shop in Asla Park yesterday morning, 9 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A truck driver and his crew member were locked in the back of their truck after they were held up at gunpoint and robbed outside a shop in Asla Park yesterday morning, 9 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said they had been delivering bread to a shop in Asla Park just after 09:30 when three armed men approached them and held them up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The gunmen stole an undisclosed amount of cash, two cellphones, a wallet, some bank cards and a driver’s licence before locking the two in the back and fleeing the scene.","html":"The gunmen stole an undisclosed amount of cash, two cellphones, a wallet, some bank cards and a driver’s licence before locking the two in the back and fleeing the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victims were helped out by a member of the community and the police were called. The victims were not injured during the robbery.","html":"The victims were helped out by a member of the community and the police were called. The victims were not injured during the robbery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A case of robbery with a firearm is under investigation by KwaNonqaba Detective Sergeant Vusi Ndala. If you have any information, contact him on 044 606 5623.","html":"A case of robbery with a firearm is under investigation by KwaNonqaba Detective Sergeant Vusi Ndala. If you have any information, contact him on 044 606 5623."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Driver, crew member locked in bread truck in Asla Park armed robbery
